hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if any(k in p for k in ['.env', '_key.js', 'secret', 'credentials']) else 0)"
FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))") && [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
